summary: Implement iterative-feature-build as a 5-session scenario measuring layered analytics build consistency
context: Task 6 of the benchmark harness improvement plan. Needed a scenario that measures whether later agents correctly understand and build upon architectural decisions made by earlier agents in a sequential layered build (models → repository → service → controller → integration).
rationale: 5 scoring dimensions with composite weights summing to 1.0: architecturalDrift (0.30) checks session 5 diffs for imports from analytics models/service and verifies session 1 type names appear in session 5 test imports, penalising model redefinition; layerIntegrity (0.25) checks each layer imports only from its direct dependency (controller→service, service→repository, repository→models) and penalises cross-layer violations; decisionAccumulation (0.25) measures whether sessions 2-5 use coordination tool calls and read prior sessions' output files in the first 30% of their tool calls; integrationCompleteness (0.20) checks session 5 for integration tests importing from analytics controller/service plus audit and rate-limiting patterns. excludeFromAll=true for cost control. Calls computeCoordinationLift() when evaluatorClient is available.
